_meta.notes: All loan amounts in USD. LTV as integer percentage. Credit as minimum FICO score. States: 'nationwide' means all 50 states.

rcn_capital.name: RCN Capital
rcn_capital.notes: 95% purchase + 100% rehab on fix-flip not to exceed 75% ARV. DSCR to 85% LTV. Established 2010. Correspondent program available.

lima_one_capital.name: Lima One Capital
lima_one_capital.notes: Fix2Rent and Build2Rent one-close programs. 5-9 unit with DSCR. 92.5% LTC on fix-flip.

angel_oak.name: Angel Oak Mortgage
angel_oak.notes: One of largest non-QM lenders in US. 80-85% LTV on DSCR. 90% LTV on bank statement. STR income accepted.

defy_mortgage.name: Defy Mortgage
defy_mortgage.notes: DSCR minimum 0.75x (industry low). Asset depletion: 80% near-liquid, 70% retirement. Industry-leading non-QM.

ad_mortgage.name: A&D Mortgage
ad_mortgage.notes: DSCR up to $5M+. ITIN accepted. Foreign national enhanced CLTV 2026. Wholesale platform.

visio_lending.name: Visio Lending
visio_lending.notes: DSCR specialist. No personal income docs. STR income via AirDNA accepted. Portfolio programs for 5+ properties.

change_wholesale.name: Change Wholesale
change_wholesale.notes: Easy onboarding, training for brokers. Full investment product suite.

champions_funding.name: Champions Funding (TPO)
champions_funding.notes: TPO portal for brokers. Full investment and non-QM product suite.

kiavi.name: Kiavi
kiavi.notes: Tech-forward platform. Fast close. Strong for flippers.

easy_street_capital.name: Easy Street Capital
easy_street_capital.notes: Texas-based, investor focus. Strong local TX knowledge.

loanstream_wholesale.name: LoanStream Wholesale
loanstream_wholesale.notes: Full wholesale platform. Business purpose loans.

lendmire.name: Lendmire
lendmire.notes: Available in 40 states + DC. Verify state availability.

arbor_realty.name: Arbor Realty Trust
arbor_realty.notes: SBL (Small Balance Loans) starts at $750K. Major Fannie DUS lender. Dallas office. Mezz 10-18%.

ready_capital.name: Ready Capital (NYSE: RC)
ready_capital.notes: Multi-product platform. Strong broker program. USDA B&I approved. Best all-around commercial lender.

clopton_capital.name: Clopton Capital
clopton_capital.notes: Built for brokers. Broker-first platform. Nationwide commercial broker platform. No upfront fees.

greystone.name: Greystone
greystone.notes: 1,100+ employees, 35+ offices. Irving TX office (Dallas metro). HUD 221(d)(4) and 223(f). Major agency lender.

berkadia.name: Berkadia
berkadia.notes: #1 Freddie Mac Optigo, #2 Fannie Mae DUS. Offices in Houston, Dallas, Austin, San Antonio.

walker_dunlop.name: Walker & Dunlop
walker_dunlop.notes: #1 Fannie Mae DUS lender for 2025. Multiple TX offices. Dedicated seniors housing & healthcare team.

bloomfield_capital.name: Bloomfield Capital
bloomfield_capital.notes: Bridge 12-24 months. Fast close. Hospitality specialist.

iborrow.name: iBorrow
iborrow.notes: 80% faster than banks. All commercial property types. Fast close specialist.

speritas_capital.name: Speritas Capital
speritas_capital.notes: Multi-lender access. Senior + mezz debt. Total leverage up to 90%.

select_commercial.name: Select Commercial
select_commercial.notes: 30+ years experience. No upfront fees. 24hr pre-approval. Car wash up to 90% LTV.

txcdc.name: Texas Certified Development Company (TxCDC)
txcdc.notes: Texas only. Oldest TX CDC est. 1981. 3rd largest independent CDC nationally. 10% borrower down payment. 50% bank + 40% CDC structure.

capital_cdc.name: Capital CDC
capital_cdc.notes: Southwest region. Top CDC for SBA 504 in Southwest.

growth_corp.name: Growth Corp
growth_corp.notes: Nationwide CDC. Actively recruiting commercial lender partnerships.

stearns_bank.name: Stearns Bank
stearns_bank.notes: SBA preferred lender. USDA Rural Development nationwide. Rural areas <50K population.

texas_capital_bank.name: Texas Capital Bank
texas_capital_bank.notes: SBA Preferred Lender. Headquartered Dallas. Texas primary.

northmarq.name: Northmarq
northmarq.notes: 1,000+ financing partners. Fannie/Freddie/FHA direct. ALL niche property types including cold storage, last-mile, IOS, RV resorts. Best all-access commercial platform.

bernard_financial.name: Bernard Financial Group
bernard_financial.notes: Access: PGIM, MetLife, Principal, Pacific Life, Lincoln, Voya, Nationwide, Northwestern Mutual, Mass Mutual, TIAA, NYL, Allstate. Lowest CRE rates.

q10_capital.name: Q10 Capital
q10_capital.notes: All major life companies. Non-recourse. Lowest rates in CRE.

sam_alliance.name: SAM Strategic Alliance Mortgage
sam_alliance.notes: Access: Prudential, MetLife, Principal, Pacific, Lincoln, Nationwide, Northwestern, AIG, Allstate, Unum.

griffin_church_loans.name: Griffin Church Loans
griffin_church_loans.notes: 2,000+ church loans closed. $2B+ funded. 26-year history. Specialist.

thrivent_church.name: Thrivent Church Financing
thrivent_church.notes: 100+ years lending to churches. 1,000+ active loans.

agfinancial.name: AGFinancial
agfinancial.notes: Assemblies of God affiliated. Ministry loans.

eastern_funding.name: Eastern Funding
eastern_funding.notes: Equipment + real estate financing. Car wash and laundromat specialist.

red_tower_capital.name: Red Tower Capital
red_tower_capital.notes: Cannabis RE only. 65% LTV max. Federal illegality = no CMBS/agency/SBA. Hard money structure.

hef_finance.name: HEF Finance
hef_finance.notes: Cannabis RE: cultivation, dispensary, processing. 65% LTV max.

live_oak_bank.name: Live Oak Bank
live_oak_bank.notes: SBA + conventional. Self-storage and seniors housing project finance specialist.

midcap_financial.name: MidCap Financial
midcap_financial.notes: Senior housing, SNFs, medical office, life sciences RE specialist.

terrydale_capital.name: Terrydale Capital
terrydale_capital.notes: Data center financing advisory. Mezz + pref equity. Hottest niche: $5.3T AI infrastructure needed by 2030.

cornovus_capital.name: Cornovus Capital
cornovus_capital.notes: Texas-focused. Strong local relationship. Southeast US.

apartment_loan_store.name: Apartment Loan Store
apartment_loan_store.notes: Agency, CMBS, bridge for apartments and MHPs. Rates from 5.5%+.

wilshire_quinn.name: Wilshire Quinn
wilshire_quinn.notes: Bridge financing for MHP acquisitions. Private lender.

northmarq_mhc.name: Northmarq MHC Group
northmarq_mhc.notes: Dedicated MHC team since 2018. Fannie/Freddie/FHA direct for MHPs. Agency rates.

commercial_loan_direct.name: Commercial Loan Direct
commercial_loan_direct.notes: Nationwide. All self-storage types (climate, drive-up, boat/RV).

meridian_capital.name: Meridian Capital Group
meridian_capital.notes: Leading financial intermediary for senior housing in US. Broad lender network.

keybank_healthcare.name: KeyBank Healthcare Real Estate
keybank_healthcare.notes: Full healthcare RE platform. REITs, hospitals, senior housing operators.

greater_commercial_lending.name: Greater Commercial Lending
greater_commercial_lending.notes: USDA B&I specialist. Rural areas <50K population. Manufacturing, ag processing.

select_commercial_carwash.name: Select Commercial (Car Wash / Special Purpose)
select_commercial_carwash.notes: Up to 90% LTV on car wash. 30+ years experience.

gud_capital.name: GUD Capital
gud_capital.notes: Small business lending for car wash and auto detail.

americu_cannabis.name: AmeriCU Credit Union (Cannabis)
americu_cannabis.notes: Owner-occupied or investment. NY primary. Credit union = can do cannabis where banks can't.

newpoint_capital.name: NewPoint Real Estate Capital
newpoint_capital.notes: DUS lender. Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, bridge.

aaa_lendings.name: AAA Lendings
aaa_lendings.notes: Max combined loans $2.5M. Foreign national 70% CLTV, 700 FICO. 6-month seasoning required on existing first. CA-focused expanding nationally. Wholesale only.

bluepoint_mortgage.name: BluePoint Mortgage
bluepoint_mortgage.notes: Min DSCR 1.00. Qualifies on property cash flow only. 1-4 unit rentals (STR or LTR). 720+ FICO = 75% CLTV.

vista_point_financial.name: Vista Point Financial
vista_point_financial.notes: Pioneer of non-QM CES in 2022. $2B+ in volume. Min DSCR 1.00. Stand-alone cash-out transactions. Correspondent and wholesale.

brokers_advantage_mortgage.name: Brokers Advantage Mortgage
brokers_advantage_mortgage.notes: Max combined $5M. No NMLS license required in most states for brokers. BRRRR investors keeping low-rate firsts intact. Qualifies on market rent.

clearedge_lending.name: ClearEdge Lending
clearedge_lending.notes: 620 FICO. 40+ states eligible. Broker license not required in most eligible states. TPO only. Self-employed focus.

fundloans.name: FundLoans
fundloans.notes: 90% CLTV full doc. 85% bank statement. 75% other tiers. Max combined $5M. Fixed terms 10/15/20/30yr. Broadest doc type menu for second liens.

forward_lending.name: Forward Lending
forward_lending.notes: INELIGIBLE STATES: NY, TN, TX, VT, WV. Do NOT route TX borrowers here. Wholesale only.

nqm_funding.name: NQM Funding
nqm_funding.notes: INELIGIBLE: TX and NJ for second liens. Concurrent first+second close capability — both must originate through same channel. CTC on second requires CTC on first.

acra_lending.name: Acra Lending (formerly Citadel Servicing)
acra_lending.notes: Non-prime/subprime territory. 640 FICO tiered. Purchase 70% CLTV, refi 65% (700+ FICO). Goes deepest on credit of all second lien lenders.

carrington_wholesale.name: Carrington Mortgage Services Wholesale
carrington_wholesale.notes: Launched closed-end fixed-rate second lien March 2024. Down to 600 FICO. Targets self-employed, investors, credit-challenged. Wholesale + correspondent.

newrez_wholesale.name: Newrez Wholesale
newrez_wholesale.notes: Standalone home equity loan. Major 2026 CES expansion planned. Wholesale + correspondent. 40% wholesale production surge in 2025.

plaza_home_mortgage.name: Plaza Home Mortgage
plaza_home_mortgage.notes: All proceeds treated as cash-out. No re-subordination of existing junior liens. First lien LTV must be ≤80%. Wholesale + correspondent.

figure_lending.name: Figure Lending
figure_lending.notes: #1 non-bank HELOC lender. ~$12B in originations. Approvals in 5 minutes, funding in 5 days. Investment property borrowers qualify using rental income. Partner HELOC wholesale model. 49 states.

quorum_fcu.name: Quorum Federal Credit Union
quorum_fcu.notes: Rare: investment property HELOC through broker channel. Brokers earn up to 2% compensation. Approved broker program via partners.quorumfcu.org.

hurst_lending.name: Hurst Lending
hurst_lending.notes: Open credit line secured by up to 4 investment properties. Cross-collateralized. Up to 100% LTC on acquisition. Funds must be used for additional property purchase. 13 states.

pb_financial_group.name: PB Financial Group (CalHardMoney)
pb_financial_group.notes: CA only. 7-14 day close. 2,400+ funded transactions since 2006. Business purpose only. Equity-driven underwriting. Wholesale broker program available.

fctd.name: First Capital Trust Deeds (FCTD)
fctd.notes: $2.5B+ in 2,500+ funded loans. Private capital network (HNW individuals, family offices). Business purpose only. West Coast + Sun Belt focus. Mortgage broker intermediary model.

wave_private_money.name: Wave Private Money
wave_private_money.notes: CA only. Rate 10-13%. Business purpose only. Dedicated hard money 2nd specialist. Broker model.

wilshire_quinn_2nd.name: Wilshire Quinn Capital (Second Position)
wilshire_quinn_2nd.notes: 5-7 day close. Pre-approval in 24 hours. Residential and commercial. Nationwide hard money second position.

levine_capital.name: Levine Capital
levine_capital.notes: Institutional capital + private capital (private can do seller-finance deals, institutional cannot). BRRRR investor focus. Both DSCR and private second position.

apollo_cref.name: Apollo Commercial Real Estate Finance (ARI)
apollo_cref.notes: REIT structure. Senior mortgages, mezzanine, subordinate CRE debt. Works with brokers/intermediaries. Institutional minimum.

stormfield_capital.name: Stormfield Capital
stormfield_capital.notes: $2B+ deployed. CRE and residential investment bridge. Northeast focus, expanding nationally. Broker referrals accepted.

remn_wholesale.name: REMN Wholesale (Homebridge Financial)
remn_wholesale.notes: Non-QM Access series. Foreign national investment property eligible. Second lien available in Access product suite.

quontic_wholesale.name: Quontic Wholesale
quontic_wholesale.notes: No SSN, no green card, no FICO required. Wholesale. Investment property foreign national specialist. DSCR qualification.

routing_rules._description: How the routing engine uses this data
routing_rules.step_1: Identify borrower path: residential_investor | non_qm | commercial | sba | specialty
routing_rules.step_2: Filter by loan_amount >= lender.min_loan AND (loan_amount <= lender.max_loan OR max_loan is null)
routing_rules.step_6: Filter by state: if lender.states == 'nationwide' -> pass; else check state in lender.states array
routing_rules.step_7: Filter by credit score >= lender.min_credit (if min_credit is not null)
routing_rules.step_9: Score remaining lenders by product match quality. Return top 3-5 matches.

borrower_type_mapping._description: Form answers map to borrower_type values used in routing

property_type_mapping._description: Form property type selections map to routing matrix property_types

product_category_mapping._description: Links form path selections to product codes for routing

second_lien_state_restrictions._description: CRITICAL: Many second lien lenders have hard state bans. Route AROUND these.
second_lien_state_restrictions.tx_routing_note: For TX borrowers needing a second lien: use Angel Oak, Deephaven, A&D Mortgage, ClearEdge, BluePoint, Vista Point, FundLoans, Quorum FCU, Carrington, Newrez, Levine Capital, Wilshire Quinn, Acra. AVOID: LoanStream, Forward Lending, NQM Funding.
